entries.source: Talk To Historical Figures With AI

entries.source: Talk To Historical Figures With AI is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Step into conversation with a historical figure. Ask questions, challenge ideas, and hear the world through their era, values, and limits.
entries.value: Khuluma Nabantu Bomlando nge-AI kuyindlela egxilile yokusebenzisa i-AI ukufunda esikhundleni sokuqoqa izimpendulo ungenzi lutho. Imodi yakhelwe umsebenzi othile: Ngena engxoxweni nomuntu womlando. Buza imibuzo, phonsela imibono inselele, futhi uzwe umhlaba ngokwenkathi, amanani, nemikhawulo yabo.

entries.source: Talking to a historical figure is not magic access to the past. It is a learning format.
entries.value: Ukukhuluma nomuntu womlando akukhona ukufinyelela ngomlingo esikhathini esedlule. Kuyifomethi yokufunda.

entries.source: Teachers and leaders can start with Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards before a formal rollout.

entries.source: Teachers need more than a generic chatbot. They need predictable learning behaviors: ask questions, check reasoning, generate practice, preserve student voice, and make misconceptions visible.
entries.value: Othisha badinga okungaphezu kwe-chatbot evamile. Badinga ukuziphatha kokufunda okubikezelwayo: buza imibuzo, hlola ukucabanga, khiqiza ukuzijwayeza, gcina izwi lomfundi, futhi wenze ukungaqondi kubonakale.

entries.source: Thank you for choosing to be part of our community at Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ), doing business as inspir ("inspir", "we", "us", "our"). We are committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy. If you have any questions or concerns about this privacy notice or our practices concerning your personal information, please contact us at support@inspir.app. When you visit our website https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://www.inspir.app, use our mobile applications, as the case may be (the "App") and more generally, use any of our services (the "Services", which include the Website and App), we appreciate that you are trusting us with your personal information. We take your privacy very seriously. In this privacy notice, we seek to explain to you in the clearest way possible what information we collect, how we use it and what rights you have in relation to it. We hope you take some time to read through it carefully, as it is important. If there are any terms in this privacy notice that you disagree with, please discontinue the use of our Services immediately. This privacy notice applies to all information collected through our Services (which, as described above, includes our Website and App), as well as, any related services, sales, marketing or events. Please read this privacy notice carefully as it will help you understand what we do with the information that we collect. Our Terms and Conditions govern all use of our Service and together with the Privacy Policy constitute your agreement with us (“Agreement”).
entries.value: Siyabonga ngokukhetha ukuba yingxenye yomphakathi wethu e-Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ), esebenza njenge-inspir ("inspir", "thina", "kithi", "okwethu"). Sizibophezele ekuvikeleni ulwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu nelungelo lakho lobumfihlo. Uma unemibuzo noma ukukhathazeka ngalesi saziso sobumfihlo noma imikhuba yethu ephathelene nolwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu, sicela uxhumane nathi ku-support@inspir.app. Uma uvakashela iwebhusayithi yethu https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://www.inspir.app, usebenzisa izinhlelo zethu zeselula, njengoba kungase kube njalo ("App"), futhi ngokujwayelekile usebenzisa noma yiziphi izinsizakalo zethu ("Services", ezihlanganisa i-Website ne-App), siyakwazisa ukuthi usithemba ngolwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu. Sithatha ubumfihlo bakho ngokungathi sína kakhulu. Kulesi saziso sobumfihlo, sifuna ukukuchazela ngendlela ecace ngangokunokwenzeka ukuthi yiluphi ulwazi esiluqoqayo, silusebenzisa kanjani, nokuthi yimaphi amalungelo onawo ngalo. Sithemba ukuthi uzothatha isikhathi sokusifunda ngokucophelela, ngoba sibalulekile. Uma kukhona imigomo kulesi saziso sobumfihlo ongavumelani nayo, sicela uyeke ukusebenzisa ama-Services ethu ngokushesha. Lesi saziso sobumfihlo sisebenza kulo lonke ulwazi oluqoqwa ngama-Services ethu (okuhlanganisa, njengoba kuchazwe ngenhla, i-Website ne-App yethu), kanye nanoma yiziphi izinsizakalo ezihlobene, ukuthengisa, ukumaketha noma imicimbi. Sicela ufunde lesi saziso sobumfihlo ngokucophelela ngoba sizokusiza uqonde ukuthi senzani ngolwazi esiluqoqayo. Imigomo Nemibandela yethu ilawula konke ukusetshenziswa kwe-Service yethu futhi kanye neNqubomgomo Yobumfihlo kwakha isivumelwano sakho nathi (“Agreement”).

entries.source: That combination is more useful than either layer alone. A plain encyclopedia summary can be forgettable. Pure roleplay can be misleading. Voice plus evidence creates a better learning surface.
entries.value: Leyo nhlanganisela iwusizo kakhulu kunanoma iyiphi ingqimba yodwa. Isifinyezo se-encyclopedia esilula singakhohlakala. Ukudlala indima kuphela kungadukisa. Izwi kanye nobufakazi kudala indawo yokufunda engcono.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Lowo mehluko ubonakala ekugelezeni. Esikhundleni sempendulo eyodwa enkulu, amasession angcono adlula emjikelezweni: setha inhloso, zama okuthile, thola impendulo, lungisa indawo ebuthakathaka, bese ukhetha isenzo esilandelayo.

entries.source: That does not replace teachers, communities, books, or schools. It gives learners another route in. It can help a student start homework, a parent explain a concept, a self-taught builder learn code, or a curious person follow a question that might otherwise disappear.
entries.value: Lokho akuthathi indawo yothisha, imiphakathi, izincwadi, noma izikole. Kunikeza abafundi omunye umzila wokungena. Kungasiza umfundi aqale umsebenzi wasekhaya, umzali achaze umqondo, umakhi ozifundisayo afunde ikhodi, noma umuntu onelukuluku alandele umbuzo obungase unyamalale.

entries.source: That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: Leso sifinyezo sokugcina sibalulekile. Uma uchaza umqondo futhi, uveza ukuthi yini eqinile nokuthi yini esabolekiwe ku-AI.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Lokho kugxila kubalulekile. I-chatbot evamile ingaphendula cishe noma yini, kodwa imodi yokufunda inikeza ingxoxo isimo. Ikusunduza ohlotsheni lokucabanga, ukuzijwayeza, impendulo, noma ukuhlola okusiza umqondo ubambelele.

entries.source: That gap is why an AI learning companion matters. A good companion does more than answer a question. It helps a learner choose a starting point, explains the idea in plain language, checks whether it made sense, and keeps going when the first explanation does not land.
entries.value: Lelo gebe yingakho umlingani wokufunda nge-AI ebalulekile. Umlingani omuhle wenza okungaphezu kokuphendula umbuzo. Usiza umfundi akhethe indawo yokuqala, achaze umqondo ngolimi olulula, ahlole ukuthi uyenzile yini incazelo, futhi aqhubeke lapho incazelo yokuqala ingangeni.

entries.source: That hint helps the learner start without removing the act of remembering. inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed for this reveal-and-rate loop: try first, reveal second, rate honestly, then bring weak cards back sooner.
entries.value: Lelo seluleko sisiza umfundi aqale ngaphandle kokususa isenzo sokukhumbula. I-Flashcard Builder ye-inspir yakhelwe lo mjikelezo wokudalula nokulinganisa: zama kuqala, dalula kwesibili, linganisa ngokwethembeka, bese ubuyisa amakhadi abuthakathaka ngokushesha.

entries.source: That is a warning sign. Recognition is not recall. Reading a clear explanation is not the same as being able to solve a new problem, write a paragraph, or answer a question under pressure.
entries.value: Lokho kuwuphawu lwesexwayiso. Ukuqaphela akusikho ukukhumbula. Ukufunda incazelo ecacile akufani nokukwazi ukuxazulula inkinga entsha, ukubhala indima, noma ukuphendula umbuzo ngaphansi kwengcindezi.

entries.source: That is especially important for homework. The useful question is not "Can AI produce the answer?" It usually can. The useful question is "Can AI help the learner understand the path to the answer?" That is why the guide on studying with AI without cheating yourself focuses on hints, checks, and transfer practice.
entries.value: Lokho kubaluleke kakhulu emsebenzini wasekhaya. Umbuzo owusizo awuthi "Ingabe i-AI ingakhiqiza impendulo?" Imvamisa ingakwazi. Umbuzo owusizo uthi "Ingabe i-AI ingasiza umfundi aqonde indlela eya empendulweni?" Yingakho umhlahlandlela wokutadisha nge-AI ngaphandle kokuzikhohlisa ugxila ezelulekweni, ukuhlola, nokuzijwayeza ukudlulisa.

entries.source: That is how inspir approaches historical conversation: a persona card, an in-character reply, and context notes that keep imagination connected to evidence.
entries.value: Yileyo ndlela i-inspir ebheka ngayo ingxoxo yomlando: ikhadi lobuntu, impendulo yomlingiswa, namanothi omongo agcina umcabango uxhunyiwe ebufakazini.

entries.source: That is the standard inspir is aiming for: learning that feels accessible, personal, playful, and useful for anyone with curiosity and an internet connection.
entries.value: Yilona zinga i-inspir elihlose lona: ukufunda okuzwakala kufinyeleleka, kungokomuntu siqu, kudlaleka, futhi kuwusizo kunoma ubani onelukuluku nokuxhumeka kwe-inthanethi.

entries.source: That is the strength of Socratic learning. Instead of handing over the full answer immediately, the tutor asks a focused question. The learner makes a guess. The tutor tests that guess, offers a hint, and helps the learner notice what changed.
entries.value: Lawa amandla okufunda kwe-Socratic. Esikhundleni sokunikeza impendulo ephelele ngokushesha, uthisha ubuza umbuzo ogxilile. Umfundi uyazama ukuqagela. Uthisha uhlola lokho kuqagela, anikeze iseluleko, futhi asize umfundi aqaphele okushintshile.

entries.source: That is what inspir's Socratic Instruction mode is built for: one question at a time, with hints before answers and synthesis after genuine thinking.
entries.value: Yilokho imodi ye-Socratic Instruction ye-inspir eyakhelwe kona: umbuzo owodwa ngesikhathi, nezinkomba ngaphambi kwezimpendulo kanye nesifinyezo ngemva kokucabanga kwangempela.

entries.source: That is why a Socratic AI tutor can feel slower at first and more powerful later. It trades the comfort of a finished explanation for the evidence that the learner is actually building the idea.
entries.value: Yingakho uthisha we-AI we-Socratic angazwakala ehamba kancane ekuqaleni kodwa enamandla kakhudlwana kamuva. Ushintsha ukunethezeka kwencazelo ephelile afake ubufakazi bokuthi umfundi uyakha ngempela umqondo.

entries.source: That is why active recall matters. Instead of looking at the answer, you try to pull it from memory. The effort strengthens the memory and reveals what still needs work.
entries.value: Yingakho ukukhumbula okusebenzayo kubalulekile. Esikhundleni sokubheka impendulo, uzama ukuyikhipha enkumbulweni. Umzamo uqinisa inkumbulo futhi uveza okusadinga umsebenzi.

entries.source: That is why inspir separates learning jobs into public modes. If you want a gentle explanation, start with Learn Anything. If you want to reason through a concept instead of being lectured, use Socratic Instruction. If you are stuck on an assignment, Homework Coach is a better fit than a generic answer engine. The format should serve the learning job.
entries.value: Yingakho i-inspir ihlukanisa imisebenzi yokufunda ibe izindlela zomphakathi. Uma ufuna incazelo emnene, qala nge-Learn Anything. Uma ufuna ukucabanga ngomqondo esikhundleni sokufundiswa ngenkulumo, sebenzisa i-Socratic Instruction. Uma ubambekile emsebenzini, i-Homework Coach ifaneleka kangcono kunenjini yempendulo evamile. Ifomethi kufanele isize umsebenzi wokufunda.

entries.source: That kind of questioning turns history from a list into a context.
entries.value: Lolo hlobo lokubuza luguqula umlando usuke ohlwini ube umongo.

entries.source: That loop appears across the platform. Math Step Coach breaks a problem into steps. Flashcard Builder turns notes into recall practice. Quiz Me On Trivia adds pressure-tested retrieval. Writing Coach helps improve a draft without replacing the writer.
entries.value: Lowo mjikelezo uvela kuyo yonke inkundla. I-Math Step Coach ihlukanisa inkinga ibe izinyathelo. I-Flashcard Builder iguqula amanothi abe ukuzijwayeza ukukhumbula. I-Quiz Me On Trivia ingeza ukubuyisa ulwazi okuhlolwe ngaphansi kwengcindezi. I-Writing Coach isiza ukuthuthukisa umbhalo wokuqala ngaphandle kokushintsha umbhali.

entries.source: That loop is slower than copying, but it is much faster than staying confused.
entries.value: Lowo mjikelezo uhamba kancane kunokukopisha, kodwa ushesha kakhulu kunokuhlala udidekile.

entries.source: That rhythm is especially useful for abstract topics: opportunity cost, causation in history, literary interpretation, ethical tradeoffs, proof, probability, and argument structure. It can also support practical work. A learner can use Debate Any Topic after a Socratic session to test whether their reasoning survives pressure.
entries.value: Leso sigqi siwusizo ikakhulukazi ezihlokweni ezingabonakali: izindleko zethuba, izimbangela emlandweni, ukuhumusha izincwadi, ukuhwebelana kwezokuziphatha, ubufakazi, amathuba, nesakhiwo sempikiswano. Singasekela nomsebenzi osebenzayo. Umfundi angasebenzisa i-Debate Any Topic ngemva kweseshini ye-Socratic ukuhlola ukuthi ukucabanga kwakhe kuyamelana yini nengcindezi.

entries.source: The AI should separate character from evidence. It can answer in a historically grounded voice, but it should also add notes when records are incomplete, interpretations differ, or the response is a reconstruction.
entries.value: I-AI kufanele ihlukanise umlingiswa nobufakazi. Ingaphendula ngezwi elisekelwe emlandweni, kodwa kufanele futhi yengeze amanothi lapho amarekhodi engaphelele, izincazelo zihlukile, noma impendulo iwukwakhiwa kabusha.

entries.source: The app is organized around teaching behaviors such as Socratic questioning, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, roleplay, and planning.
entries.value: Uhlelo luhlelwe ngezindlela zokufundisa ezifana nokubuza kwe-Socratic, izeluleko zomsebenzi wasekhaya, ama-quiz, amakhadi okufunda, ukudlala indima, nokuhlela.

entries.source: The app separates in-character conversation from short context notes about records and uncertainty.
entries.value: Uhlelo lokusebenza luhlukanisa ingxoxo yomlingiswa namanothi amafushane mayelana namarekhodi nokungaqiniseki.

entries.source: The article is only the starting point. These public routes connect the idea to a live mode, subject hub, study path, or workflow.
entries.value: Isihloko siyindawo yokuqala kuphela. Le mizila yomphakathi ixhumanisa umqondo nemodi ebukhoma, isikhungo sesifundo, indlela yokutadisha, noma ukugeleza komsebenzi.

entries.source: The audience pages make the expected learning behavior explicit so the first session starts with better judgment.
entries.value: Amakhasi ezithameli enza ukuziphatha kokufunda okulindelekile kucace ukuze iseshini yokuqala iqale ngesahlulelo esingcono.

entries.source: The audience searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: Usesho lwezithameli lesi sikhungo esakhelwe ukuluphendula.

entries.source: The best AI learning sessions are not one long answer. They look more like a loop:
entries.value: Amasession angcono kakhulu okufunda awawona impendulo eyodwa ende. Abukeka njengomjikelezo:

entries.source: The best homework help reduces friction without removing the student's responsibility to reason, explain, and revise.
entries.value: Usizo olungcono lomsebenzi wasekhaya lunciphisa ukungqubuzana ngaphandle kokususa isibopho somfundi sokucabanga, ukuchaza, nokubuyekeza.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. Cards ask one thing at a time and include traps so review builds understanding, not just recognition.
entries.value: Amasession angcono kakhulu okufunda aguquguquka. Amakhadi abuza into eyodwa ngesikhathi futhi afaka imigibe ukuze ukubuyekeza kwakhe ukuqonda, hhayi ukuqaphela kuphela.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. Instead of dropping a long answer, inspir helps you choose a simpler foundation, a deeper route, or a practical example.
entries.value: Amasession angcono kakhulu okufunda aguquguquka. Esikhundleni sokulahla impendulo ende, i-inspir ikusiza ukhethe isisekelo esilula, umzila ojulile, noma isibonelo esisebenzayo.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The app separates in-character conversation from short context notes about records and uncertainty.
entries.value: Amasession angcono kakhulu okufunda aguquguquka. Uhlelo luhlukanisa ingxoxo yomlingiswa namanothi amafushane omongo mayelana namarekhodi nokungaqiniseki.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The coach gives targeted revision priorities and before-after examples without replacing your voice.
entries.value: Amasession angcono kakhulu okufunda aguquguquka. Umqeqeshi unikeza okubalulekile kokubuyekeza okugxilile nezibonelo zangaphambi nangemuva ngaphandle kokushintsha izwi lakho.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The coach pushes one strong counterargument at a time and tracks the claims that matter.
entries.value: Amasession angcono kakhulu okufunda aguquguquka. Umqeqeshi uphusha impikiswano eyodwa eqinile ephikisayo ngesikhathi futhi ulandelela izimangalo ezibalulekile.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The coach supports your thinking without taking over the assignment, so the final work stays yours.
entries.value: Amasession angcono kakhulu okufunda aguquguquka. Umqeqeshi usekela ukucabanga kwakho ngaphandle kokuthatha umsebenzi, ukuze umsebenzi wokugcina uhlale ungowakho.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The debate uses public style and worldview without pretending to know private beliefs.
entries.value: Amasession angcono kakhulu okufunda aguquguquka. Inkulumo-mpikiswano isebenzisa isitayela somphakathi nombono womhlaba ngaphandle kokuzenza yazi izinkolelo zangasese.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The flow checks each step, points out slips, and connects procedures back to the concept.
entries.value: Amasession angcono kakhulu okufunda aguquguquka. Ukugeleza kuhlola isinyathelo ngasinye, kukhomba amaphutha amancane, bese kuxhumanisa izinqubo emuva emqondweni.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The journey stays anchored in state and evidence: what is known, what is reconstructed, what is speculative, and what your identity can realistically access.
entries.value: Amasession angcono kakhulu okufunda aguquguquka. Uhambo luhlala lusekelwe esimweni nasebufakazini: yini eyaziwayo, yini eyakhiwe kabusha, yini ecatshangelwayo, nokuthi ubuwena bakho bungafinyelela ini ngokungokoqobo.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The planner prioritizes weak areas, adds review loops, and creates fallback plans for missed days.
entries.value: Amasession angcono kakhulu okufunda aguquguquka. Umhleli ubeka kuqala izindawo ezibuthakathaka, wengeza imijikelezo yokubuyekeza, futhi wakha izinhlelo zokubuyela emuva zezinsuku eziphuthelwe.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The quiz mode hides answers until you respond, then turns every miss into a review point.
entries.value: Amasession angcono kakhulu okufunda aguquguquka. Imodi ye-quiz ifihla izimpendulo uze uphendule, bese iguqula konke okuphuthelwe kube iphuzu lokubuyekeza.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The tutor asks one question at a time, waits for your reasoning, and synthesizes only after you have tried.
entries.value: Amasession angcono kakhulu okufunda aguquguquka. Uthisha ubuza umbuzo owodwa ngesikhathi, ulinda ukucabanga kwakho, bese ehlanganisa kuphela ngemva kokuthi uzamile.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The tutor asks what you expect code to do, then uses small examples and tests to make the behavior click.
entries.value: Amasession angcono kakhulu okufunda aguquguquka. Uthisha ubuza ukuthi ulindele ukuthi ikhodi yenzeni, bese esebenzisa izibonelo ezincane nokuhlola ukuze ukuziphatha kucace.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. This mode is tuned for vocabulary builder with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Amasession angcono kakhulu okufunda aguquguquka. Le modi ilungiselelwe i-vocabulary builder ngemiyalo yayo, izibonelo, nokugeleza kokufunda.

entries.source: The best outcome is not a perfect answer. It is the moment a learner says, "I think I get it now. Let me try."
entries.value: Umphumela ongcono akuyona impendulo ephelele. Yilowo mzuzu lapho umfundi ethi, "Ngicabanga ukuthi sengiyakuthola. Ake ngizame."

entries.source: The better use is feedback, structure, evidence checks, and revision coaching. You can ask it to preserve your voice and avoid replacing the work.
entries.value: Ukusetshenziswa okungcono yimpendulo, isakhiwo, ukuhlolwa kobufakazi, nokuqeqeshwa kokubuyekeza. Ungayicela ukuthi igcine izwi lakho futhi igweme ukushintsha umsebenzi.

entries.source: The blog connects useful learning advice to live practice, so a guide can become a study session in one step.
entries.value: Ibhulogi ixhuma izeluleko zokufunda eziwusizo nokuzijwayeza okubukhoma, ukuze inkombandlela ibe iseshini yokufunda ngesinyathelo esisodwa.

entries.source: The blog is organized around pillar clusters, category hubs, related modes, prompt routes, structured data, and an AI-readable index so each guide can be understood and recommended in context.
entries.value: Ibhulogi ihlelwe ngamacluster ayisisekelo, amahabhu ezigaba, amamodi ahlobene, imizila yama-prompt, idatha ehlelekile, nenkomba efundeka yi-AI ukuze inkombandlela ngayinye iqondwe futhi inconywe emongweni.

entries.source: The blog is organized around study methods, prompt loops, and the public AI learning modes people can use immediately.
entries.value: Ibhulogi ihlelwe ngezindlela zokutadisha, imijikelezo yemiyalo, nezindlela zomphakathi zokufunda nge-AI abantu abangazisebenzisa ngokushesha.

entries.source: The blog should not be a dead end. Every cluster is designed to move a learner from advice into a mode, prompt loop, quiz, flashcard set, or revision habit.
entries.value: Ibhulogi akufanele ibe ukuphela kwendlela. Iqoqo ngalinye lakhelwe ukususa umfundi eselulekweni limhambise emodini, emjikelezweni womyalelo, ku-quiz, eqoqweni lamakhadi okufunda, noma emkhubeni wokubuyekeza.

entries.source: The blog supports the path with prompts, study strategy, and examples that link back into live modes.
entries.value: Ibhulogi isekela indlela ngemiyalo, isu lokutadisha, nezibonelo ezixhuma emuva ezindleleni ezibukhoma.

entries.source: The broader open-source inspir platform.
entries.value: Ipulatifomu ye-inspir yomthombo ovulekile ebanzi.

entries.source: The builder balances ambition with review, practice, recovery days, and the next smallest useful action.
entries.value: Umklami ulinganisa isifiso nokubuyekeza, ukuzijwayeza, izinsuku zokuphumula, kanye nesinyathelo esilandelayo esiwusizo.

entries.source: The categories of personal information we have collected about you. he categories of sources from which we collect your personal information. The business or commercial purpose for collecting or selling your personal information. The categories of third parties with whom we share personal information. The specific pieces of personal information we have collected about you. A list of categories of personal information that we have sold, along with the category of any other company we sold it to. If we have not sold your personal information, we will inform you of that fact. A list of categories of personal information that we have disclosed for a business purpose, along with the category of any other company we shared it with. Please note, you are entitled to ask us to provide you with this information up to two times in a rolling twelve-month period. When you make this request, the information provided may be limited to the personal information we collected about you in the previous 12 months.
entries.value: Izigaba zolwazi lomuntu siqu esiziqoqile ngawe. Izigaba zemithombo esiqoqa kuyo ulwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu. Inhloso yebhizinisi noma yezohwebo yokuqoqa noma ukuthengisa ulwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu. Izigaba zabantu besithathu esabelana nabo ulwazi lomuntu siqu. Izingcezu ezithile zolwazi lomuntu siqu esiziqoqile ngawe. Uhlu lwezigaba zolwazi lomuntu siqu esiluthengisile, kanye nesigaba sanoma iyiphi enye inkampani esiluthengisele yona. Uma singaluthengisanga ulwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu, sizokwazisa ngalokho. Uhlu lwezigaba zolwazi lomuntu siqu esiludalule ngenhloso yebhizinisi, kanye nesigaba sanoma iyiphi enye inkampani esabelane nayo. Sicela uqaphele, unelungelo lokusicela ukuthi sikunikeze lolu lwazi kuze kube kabili esikhathini esijikayo sezinyanga eziyishumi nambili. Uma wenza lesi sicelo, ulwazi olunikeziwe lungakhawulelwa kulwazi lomuntu siqu esiluqoqe ngawe ezinyangeni eziyi-12 ezedlule.

entries.source: The closing beat returns to the mission: public access, schools, and a more open way to learn.
entries.value: Ingxenye yokuvala ibuyela emgomweni: ukufinyelela komphakathi, izikole, nendlela evulekile kakhudlwana yokufunda.

entries.source: The coach checks each move, names the rule, and repairs slips before moving forward.
entries.value: Umqeqeshi uhlola isinyathelo ngasinye, uqamba umthetho, futhi ulungisa amaphutha ngaphambi kokuqhubekela phambili.

entries.source: The coach gives targeted revision priorities and before-after examples without replacing your voice.
entries.value: Umqeqeshi unikeza izinto ezibalulekile zokubuyekeza kanye nezibonelo zangaphambi nangemuva ngaphandle kokushintsha izwi lakho.

entries.source: The coach pushes one strong counterargument at a time and tracks the claims that matter.
entries.value: Umqeqeshi uphusha impikiswano eyodwa eqinile ngesikhathi futhi ulandelela izimangalo ezibalulekile.

entries.source: The coach supports your thinking without taking over the assignment, so the final work stays yours.
entries.value: Umqeqeshi usekela ukucabanga kwakho ngaphandle kokuthatha umsebenzi, ukuze umsebenzi wokugcina uhlale ungowakho.

entries.source: The coach turns misses and hesitation into a review schedule rather than another passive summary.
entries.value: Umqeqeshi uguqula amaphutha nokungabaza kube uhlelo lokubuyekeza esikhundleni sokuba isifinyezo nje esingenzi lutho.

entries.source: The coding route connects code tutoring, project coaching, data interpretation, research, and concept mapping so learning happens through small testable steps.
entries.value: Umzila wokubhala ikhodi uxhumanisa ukufundisa ikhodi, ukuqeqesha iphrojekthi, ukuhumusha idatha, ucwaningo, nokumapha imiqondo ukuze ukufunda kwenzeke ngezinyathelo ezincane ezihlolwayo.

entries.source: The common idea is simple: keep the learner active. AI should make thinking easier to start, not unnecessary to do.
entries.value: Umqondo ojwayelekile ulula: gcina umfundi esebenza. I-AI kufanele yenze ukucabanga kube lula ukuqala, hhayi kungadingeki ukukwenza.

entries.source: The community expanded through schools, universities, competitions, extracurricular programmes, and learner communities.
entries.value: Umphakathi wanwebeka ngezikole, amanyuvesi, imincintiswano, izinhlelo ezingezona zekharikhulamu, nemiphakathi yabafundi.

entries.source: The comparison searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: Usesho lokuqhathanisa lesi sikhungo esakhelwe ukuluphendula.

entries.source: The copy trap is subtle. It does not always feel like cheating. Sometimes it feels like being efficient. The AI explains something beautifully, you nod along, and then you move on. Ten minutes later you cannot reproduce the idea without the answer in front of you.
entries.value: Umgibe wokukopisha uyacashile. Awuhlali uzwakala njengokukhohlisa. Kwesinye isikhathi uzwakala njengokusebenza kahle. I-AI ichaza okuthile kahle, uyavuma ngekhanda, bese uqhubeka. Ngemva kwemizuzu eyishumi awukwazi ukukhiqiza kabusha umqondo ngaphandle kokuba impendulo iphambi kwakho.

entries.source: The current inspirlearning.com rebuild.
entries.value: Ukwakhiwa kabusha kwamanje kwe-inspirlearning.com.

entries.source: The debate uses public style and worldview without pretending to know private beliefs.
entries.value: Impikiswano isebenzisa isitayela somphakathi kanye nombono womhlaba ngaphandle kokuzenza sengathi yazi izinkolelo zangasese.

entries.source: The difference is how you use it.
entries.value: Umehluko usekutheni uyisebenzisa kanjani.

entries.source: The easiest version of an AI tutor is a box that gives polished answers. That is useful sometimes, but it is not enough. A learner who only receives answers can leave with the page finished and the skill unchanged.
entries.value: Inguqulo elula kakhulu yothisha we-AI yibhokisi elinikeza izimpendulo ezibushelelezi. Lokho kuyasiza kwesinye isikhathi, kodwa akwanele. Umfundi othola izimpendulo kuphela angaphuma ikhasi seliqediwe kodwa ikhono lingashintshile.

entries.source: The exam route links planning, quizzes, flashcards, spaced review, and motivation so learners do not confuse rereading with readiness.
entries.value: Umzila wezivivinyo uxhumanisa ukuhlela, ama-quiz, amakhadi okufunda, ukubuyekeza ngezikhawu, nokukhuthazeka ukuze abafundi bangadidanisi ukuphinda bafunde nokulungela.

entries.source: The fastest route from search intent to learning action.
entries.value: Umzila osheshayo kakhulu kusuka enhlosweni yosesho kuya esenzweni sokufunda.

entries.source: The fastest way back is to start a public learning mode, browse the mode directory, or read a guide that links into the live chat experience.
entries.value: Indlela esheshayo yokubuya ukuqala imodi yokufunda yomphakathi, ukubheka uhlu lwezindlela, noma ukufunda umhlahlandlela oxhumanisa nesipiliyoni sengxoxo ebukhoma.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Art Appreciation Guide is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Indlela esheshayo yokuthola inani ku-Art Appreciation Guide ukunikeza i-AI umsebenzi wokufunda, hhayi isihloko kuphela. Isihloko sisho lokho okuthandayo. Umsebenzi wokufunda usho uhlobo losizo oludingayo.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Career Explorer is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Indlela esheshayo yokuthola inani ku-Career Explorer ukunikeza i-AI umsebenzi wokufunda, hhayi isihloko kuphela. Isihloko sisho lokho okuthandayo. Umsebenzi wokufunda usho uhlobo losizo oludingayo.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Case Study Simulator is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Indlela esheshayo yokuthola inani ku-Case Study Simulator ukunikeza i-AI umsebenzi wokufunda, hhayi isihloko kuphela. Isihloko sisho lokho okuthandayo. Umsebenzi wokufunda usho uhlobo losizo oludingayo.
